ground_truth.title: Cameras - SoCal511
ground_truth.main_content: SoCal511 Freeway Cameras page provides real-time traffic camera listings for Southern California. The page features filter controls for selecting roadways, directions, and locations to narrow down camera views. A data table displays camera information including roadway name, travel direction, specific location, and a link to view each camera on an interactive map. Users can click on map links to open a modal dialog showing the camera location on a map along with an embedded video player for live camera footage. The cameras are organized by major Southern California freeways and corridors.
